meta.title: Lev: Latest Activity
meta.description: 10 most recently edited documents across the Lev public repo

props.title: Lev — Latest 10
props.subtitle: Most recently edited documents across the public repo

props.content: Dominated by kingly.cloud research (6 docs, 169 KB) — the multi-provider inference router is the largest active research track. Plus constraint engineering product design, CMS architecture, skill teasers, and VISION.md updates.

props.label: KINGLY.CLOUD
props.title: Inference Router Research Stack
props.subtitle: 6 documents — from competitive analysis to unified architecture

props.title: Unified Architecture
props.content: **21 KB** — THE synthesis doc. Executive summary, competitive position, seed analysis, provider matrix, credit system (5 tiers), 10-stage middleware pipeline, 5-phase build plan (15 weeks, ~15K LOC), 20-agent CDO build.

props.title: Gateway Architecture Patterns
props.content: **42 KB** — Production LLM proxy patterns: routing algorithms, caching strategies, observability, rate limiting, security, multi-tenancy, async queues. Mermaid topology diagrams.

props.title: Provider Landscape
props.content: **28 KB** — 18 providers across video, audio, music, text, image. 10 production-ready, 3 gaps (Suno, MidJourney, NotebookLM). Readiness matrix with API quality scores.

props.title: Credit & Billing Systems
props.content: **28 KB** — Canva, Adobe, RunwayML billing models. Monthly allowance vs credit packs. Failed-generation refunds. iOS IAP 30% commission impact analysis.

props.title: Competitive APIs
props.content: **27 KB** — 6 platforms analyzed: OpenRouter, LiteLLM, Portkey, Martian, Unify, Helicone. API formats, auth, pricing, feature gaps. kingly.cloud differentiation: multi-modal + agent-first.

props.title: claw-router Code Analysis
props.content: **23 KB** — Seed implementation audit: 18 files, 1,662 LOC. Routing strategies are decorative (1:1 alias). Wallet crypto, payment transports, XDG helpers documented. Not greenfield — refactor path.

props.label: INFRASTRUCTURE
props.title: Supporting Docs
props.subtitle: CMS, architecture, skills, and product strategy

props.title: CMS + Publish + Graph
props.content: Agent-driven CMS patterns, SQLite as canonical store, CLI-first CMS tools. Conclusion: custom SQLiteStorageAdapter beats external CMS overhead.

props.title: Graph Footer + Skills CMS
props.content: Four gaps filled: entity status hooks, SQLiteStorageAdapter, structured skills CMS for 2,857 entries, publish orchestration. 6-phase plan.

props.title: Skill Teasers Batch
props.content: Marketing copy for 6 discovery skills. Hook + teaser + 3 tweets + OG description each. Ready for here.now and social publishing.
